title: codereview-pass1: select_channel/now pseudocode chunk
description: P2: missing integration with adaptive SF full function and SNR EMA formula. P3: TOC not updated for new 2a.7 subsection. Pure pseudocode good but add per-SF SNR table reference. File as codereview.
